particulars.description: By way of first legal mortgage the freehold property known as 226 gain lane, bradford, BD3 7DW (hm land registry title number WYK237004) and by way of fixed charge all proceeds of insurance effected in respect of such property, goodwill of any business carried on at such property, the benefit of guarantees, warranties, etc, in any shares or membership rights in any management company, and in the landlord's interest in occupational leases and rents.
